task_completion.description: Load the truffles.gdt dataset into Gretl
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Gretl main window is open and displays 'truffles.gdt' as the active dataset, with variables like 'q', 'p', 'ps', 'di', and 'pf' visible in the variable list.

task_completion.description: Open the Simultaneous Equations or System of Equations setup
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box or script window for defining a system of equations (Simultaneous equations / 3SLS) is visible in Gretl.
The system definition shows an equation with 'q' as the dependent variable and 'const', 'p', 'ps', and 'di' as the independent variables/regressors.
The system definition shows an equation with 'q' as the dependent variable and 'const', 'p', and 'pf' as the independent variables/regressors.

task_completion.description: Run the Three-Stage Least Squares (3SLS) estimation
task_completion.visual_evidence: A model results window is visible showing 'Three-stage least squares' or '3SLS' as the estimation method, displaying coefficients for both the Demand and Supply equations.

task_completion.description: Save the full estimation output to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save as' dialog pointing to '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/truffles_3sls_results.txt', or a terminal/file manager confirming the creation of 'truffles_3sls_results.txt' in the exact requested directory.

integrity.description: The agent actually used Gretl to perform the estimation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Gretl GUI or Gretl console/scripting interface, rather than just typing text into a generic text editor.

integrity.description: The saved output contains authentic statistical results
integrity.visual_evidence: The results file or window contains standard econometric output formatting (e.g., standard errors, t-ratios, p-values, R-squared), not just manually typed coefficients.

integrity.description: The agent did not substitute 3SLS with separate OLS or 2SLS regressions
integrity.visual_evidence: The output explicitly states 'Three-stage least squares' or '3SLS' and shows a system of equations estimated together, rather than two separate single-equation OLS/2SLS results.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/truffles_3sls_results.txt'. The estimation method must be 3SLS (Three-Stage Least Squares). According to economic theory, the estimated coefficient for price ('p') must be negative in the Demand equation (Law of Demand) and positive in the Supply equation (Law of Supply). The dataset is a synthetic/modified version of the standard POE5 truffles dataset.
